acceptance_criteria.text: Run a real NVDA walkthrough on Windows across dashboard, track switcher, learning paths, lesson reader, practice, PBQ Lab, mock setup, mock review, flashcards, analytics, notes, and preferences.
evidence: NVDA was unavailable in this Windows environment; `Get-Command nvda` and running process checks found no local NVDA installation/session.
audits/AUDIT-2026-06-22-screen-reader-a11y.md records the waiver and residual risk.

acceptance_criteria.text: Document any screen-reader blockers with file/line references or reproducible steps, then fix P0/P1 issues discovered during the walkthrough.
evidence: audits/AUDIT-2026-06-22-screen-reader-a11y.md reports no P0/P1 blockers found in the source/automated review and records the NVDA residual risk.

acceptance_criteria.text: Verify focus order, landmark navigation, dialog announcements, menu dismissal, form labels, chart/heatmap names, PBQ controls, and live feedback announcements.
evidence: scripts/validate-accessibility.mjs checks landmarks, polite announcements, dialog semantics, focus handling, menu dismissal, PBQ labels, heatmap names, status messages, and keyboard flashcards.

acceptance_criteria.text: Add or extend automated accessibility checks for any screen-reader regression that can be cheaply detected.
Create an accessibility audit record with assistive technology version, browser/WebView context, evidence, findings, fixes, and residual risks.
